props.query: The search string or array of strings to highlight within the text.
props.matches: Pre-computed match ranges as `[start, end]` pairs. Takes priority over **query** when provided and non-empty.
props.matchAll: When enabled, all occurrences of each query term are highlighted. When disabled, only the first occurrence of each term is highlighted.
props.markClass: Additional CSS class(es) applied to each `<mark>` element wrapping a highlighted match.
